input_sources: Beck et al. (2023) KG 1991-2020 1 km raster — figshare doi:10.6084/m9.figshare.21789074.v2, file 61012822
notes: Global land area per KG class computed via terra::cellSize(mask=TRUE, unit='km') summed with terra::zonal(fun='sum', na.rm=TRUE). Ocean pixels are NA in source raster and are excluded. Total land area: 147,322,862 km². Elapsed (zonal step): 5.2 s.
